title: The Necklace
author: Guy de Maupassant

sections.title: The Invitation
sections.description: Mathilde's dissatisfaction, the ball invitation, securing dress and necklace

sections.title: The Ball
sections.description: The night of triumph where Mathilde shines in high society

sections.title: The Loss
sections.description: Discovery of missing necklace, desperate search, decision to replace

sections.title: The Sacrifice
sections.description: Ten years of poverty and hard labor to pay the debt

sections.title: The Truth
sections.description: The devastating revelation about the fake necklace

guidelines: 5 thematic sections for emotional flow, spoiler-free headers, under 30-minute story
